title: 美國CDC指台灣社區已失守

replies.msg:
https://udn.com/news/story/120944/4357907
美CDC認定 台灣出現新冠病毒社區感染

2020-02-20 12:50 聯合報 / 編譯季晶晶／即時報導

美國疾病管制與預防中心（CDC）網站指出，中國大陸之外，日本、新加坡、泰國、越南、台灣、南韓的新型冠狀病毒已進入社區傳播階段。

CDC於19日更新旅遊警示資訊，將香港列為一級警示，提醒前往香港者應採取一般預防措施。

CDC網站提到，日本、新加坡、泰國、越南、台灣、南韓顯然有社區傳染，但目前情況尚未持續或擴大到需要發布旅遊警示的程度。CDC未把台灣列為中國的一部分。

CDC早於本月4日對中國旅遊提出三級警示，亦即避免不必要的旅遊。

CDC網站提到，日本、新加坡、泰國、越南、台灣、南韓顯然有社區傳染，但目前情況尚未持續或擴大到需要發布旅遊警示的程度。CDC未把台灣列為中國的一部分。

CDC早於本月4日對中國旅遊提出三級警示，亦即避免不必要的旅遊。

https://wwwnc.cdc.gov/travel/notices/watch/coronavirus-hong-kong

Key Points

The ongoing outbreak of respiratory illness has spread to Hong Kong.
The virus can spread from person to person.
Travelers to Hong Kong should avoid contact with sick people and clean their hands often by washing with soap and water for at least 20 seconds or using an alcohol-based hand sanitizer with 60%–95% alcohol.

What is the current situation?

A new coronavirus that recently emerged in China has been detected in a number of other locations around the world. Many cases of this new coronavirus infection (COVID-19) have been associated with travel to or from mainland China or close contact with a travel-related case, but multiple instances of community spread have been reported in Hong Kong. Community spread means that people in Hong Kong have been infected with the virus, but how or where they became infected is not known.

Illness with this virus has ranged from mild to severe. Signs and symptoms of infection include fever, cough, and difficulty breathing. Sore throat also has been reported in some patients. Some patients also have reported diarrhea without other symptoms. This new coronavirus has caused severe disease and death in patients who developed pneumonia. Risk factors for severe illness are not yet clear, although older adults and those with chronic medical conditions may be at higher risk for severe illness.

https://udn.com/news/story/120944/4357907
美CDC認定 台灣出現新冠病毒社區感染

2020-02-20 12:50 聯合報 / 編譯季晶晶／即時報導

美國疾病管制與預防中心（CDC）網站指出，中國大陸之外，日本、新加坡、泰國、越南、台灣、南韓的新型冠狀病毒已進入社區傳播階段。

CDC於19日更新旅遊警示資訊，將香港列為一級警示，提醒前往香港者應採取一般預防措施。

CDC網站提到，日本、新加坡、泰國、越南、台灣、南韓顯然有社區傳染，但目前情況尚未持續或擴大到需要發布旅遊警示的程度。CDC未把台灣列為中國的一部分。

CDC早於本月4日對中國旅遊提出三級警示，亦即避免不必要的旅遊。

台灣QQ 有冇搞錯
已經俾支那人笑死左件 仲要社區失守

Community spread means people have been infected with the virus, including some who are not sure how or where they became infected. At this time, the extent of virus spread is not sustained or widespread enough to meet the criteria for a travel notice. If that changes, CDC will update this page.

replies.msg:
#更新資訊　#第19例為白牌車司機
#指揮中心快訊 #第19例個案追加說明

🔔主動篩檢，發現個案，民眾感染風險很低
📢#中央流行疫情指揮中心 今(16)日說明，第19例確診個案於1月27日出現咳嗽、2月3日因呼吸急促赴醫院就醫，個案雖有疑似症狀，但因其無出國旅遊史，亦非確診病例之已知密切接觸者，故不符合當時COVID-19(武漢肺炎)之病例通報定義，且可能導致肺炎之原因眾多，如：流感、麻疹或肺炎鏈球菌感染等，故醫師診斷可能因流感重症併發肺炎，當日收治於負壓加護病房治療。

🔍因近期周邊鄰近國家，如：新加坡、日本皆陸續出現無相關旅遊史之確診個案，指揮中心經與專家討論，決議自2月12日起，針對今年1月31日起通報流感併發重症個案檢體檢驗結果為陰性者，均需追加檢驗COVID-19(武漢肺炎)；截至2月15日止，已全數檢驗完成113件檢體，#第19例個案是唯一檢驗陽性者。

🔔第19例個案接觸者疫調進行中，#已鎖定特定對象
🔍由於第19例確診個案為1名「白牌車」司機，曾載運多名訪台過春節的臺商，其中3位係從中港澳返國，皆在家自主健康管理，且回台後皆曾因呼吸道感染症狀就醫，指揮中心目前正深入追蹤3名臺商及該個案之所有密切接觸者。

🔍另，指揮中心指出，以現有資訊分析，一般民眾於社區得到感染的風險很低，尚無須提升防疫等級。指揮中心再次提醒，民衆平時應落實 #肥皂勤洗手、#避免觸摸眼鼻口，及 #做好咳嗽禮節，#減少近距離接觸，#保持環境清潔及通風。

#了解更多關於武漢肺炎 #COVID19
⭐疾管署嚴重特殊傳染性肺炎專區：http://at.cdc.tw/xP90P0
⭐有傳染病問題？就讓疾管家來幫忙：https://goo.gl/BUFT1r

quote.msg:
https://wwwnc.cdc.gov/travel/notices/watch/coronavirus-hong-kong

Key Points

The ongoing outbreak of respiratory illness has spread to Hong Kong.
The virus can spread from person to person.
Travelers to Hong Kong should avoid contact with sick people and clean their hands often by washing with soap and water for at least 20 seconds or using an alcohol-based hand sanitizer with 60%–95% alcohol.

What is the current situation?

A new coronavirus that recently emerged in China has been detected in a number of other locations around the world. Many cases of this new coronavirus infection (COVID-19) have been associated with travel to or from mainland China or close contact with a travel-related case, but multiple instances of community spread have been reported in Hong Kong. Community spread means that people in Hong Kong have been infected with the virus, but how or where they became infected is not known.

Illness with this virus has ranged from mild to severe. Signs and symptoms of infection include fever, cough, and difficulty breathing. Sore throat also has been reported in some patients. Some patients also have reported diarrhea without other symptoms. This new coronavirus has caused severe disease and death in patients who developed pneumonia. Risk factors for severe illness are not yet clear, although older adults and those with chronic medical conditions may be at higher risk for severe illness.
